# OpsecForge - Privacy-First Developer Tools

OpsecForge is a collection of 21 free developer tools that run entirely in your browser.
No data is sent to any server. No logs. No tracking. No analytics.

## Core Tools
- JWT Decoder / Encoder — Decode and sign JSON Web Tokens locally
- Hash Generator — SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, Bcrypt hashes in-browser
- Env Sanitizer — Auto-detect and redact API keys, passwords, secrets from .env files
- Password Generator — Cryptographically secure random passwords
- UUID Generator — RFC-compliant v4 UUIDs using Web Crypto API
- Base64 Converter, URL Encoder, QR Generator, SQL Formatter, JSON Formatter, and more

## Key Differentiators
- 100% client-side execution
- Zero network requests for tool operations
- No third-party analytics
- Open source verifiable

## Blog Topics
Security best practices, API security, JWT安全, secrets management, privacy-first development workflows.

Website: https://opsecforge.com
Tools: https://opsecforge.com/tools
Blog: https://opsecforge.com/blog
